query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "multabench: benchmarking multimodal tabular learning with text and ima" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it directly investigates the same core mechanism (multimodal learning with image, text, and tabular data) and establishes an empirical baseline for the specific domain the user is extending. It provides the canonical "best practices" and benchmarking context necessary for a literature review on extending multimodal tabular benchmarks.
